query_title: The Geographer Drank His Globe Away

recommendations.title: Happiness for Beginners
recommendations.overview: At a crossroads after her divorce, a schoolteacher ventures toward a fresh start in life — and love — when she signs up for a grueling group hiking trip.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: Sleepwalk with Me
recommendations.overview: A burgeoning stand-up comedian struggles with the stress of a stalled career, a stale relationship, and the wild spurts of severe sleepwalking he is desperate to ignore.

recommendations.title: One Week
recommendations.overview: Ben Tyler has been diagnosed with cancer. With a grim chance of survival in the best case scenario even if he immediately begins treatment, he instead decides to take a motorcycle trip from Toronto through the Canadian prairies to British Columbia.

recommendations.title: Pump Up the Volume
recommendations.overview: Mark Hunter, a lonely high school student, uses his shortwave radio to moonlight as the popular pirate DJ "Hard Harry." When his show gets blamed for a teen committing suicide, the students clash with high school faculty and the authorities.

recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.

recommendations.title: Detachment
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of three weeks in the lives of several high school teachers, administrators and students through the eyes of substitute teacher, Henry Barthes. Henry roams from school to school, imparting modes of knowledge, but never staying long enough

recommendations.title: Gauguin: Voyage to Tahiti
recommendations.overview: In 1891, the French painter Paul Gauguin leaves Paris and travels to Tahiti to renew his art as a free man, far from the European artistic conventionalism. On his journey of discovery, he faces solitude and disease, but he also knows the beauty of wi

recommendations.title: Serie Noire
recommendations.overview: In the shadowy outskirts of Paris, a desperate door-to-door salesman crosses paths with a mysterious young woman trapped in a grim world. As his obsession deepens, his grip on reality begins to slip—and the line between escape and destruction starts

recommendations.title: Live Flesh
